question: In response to a quarterly sales decline due to fewer purchases of premium beverages, what specific operational changes did Starbucks CEO Brian Nickel announce, and what pricing/beverage information is visible on the in-store menu board?
answer: Brian Nickel announced Starbucks will simplify its menu and adjust prices. The in-store menu board displays various beverage options and their corresponding prices.

video: The interior of the Starbucks Coffee shop features a menu board displaying various beverage options and prices.
text: Brian Nickel announced Starbucks will simplify its menu and adjust prices.
